title: Market Gardener over Netherite Spear
description: Replaces the netherite variant of the spear with the Market Gardener from Team Fortress 2
body:
Replaces the netherite variant of the spear with the Market Gardener from Team Fortress 2.
Includes sound effects from TF2 aswell! Intended for snapshot version 25w41a.

(https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WAjCKm1ZOGQ)
